summary: Completed frontend testing of LOGITAG Map Detail Panel feature. All 7 test cases passed: Login flow, Map page navigation with sidebar/pagination, marker popup with 'Plus de détails' button, detail slide-over panel opening with all required content (asset photo, name, reference, status chips, mini map with coordinates, info rows), close button functionality, and 'Voir la fiche complète' button presence. Backdrop click to close also verified working.

minor.impact: Real-time features affected but core functionality works

minor.issue: 500 errors on some external API calls
minor.impact: Some data may not load, but app handles gracefully

passed_tests: 1. Login flow: /auth with admin/user@1234 - redirects to /tagdashboard/index
2. Navigate to Map page /tour/index - sidebar loads with asset list (200/200) and pagination (1/14)
3. Click on cluster marker to expand, then click individual marker - popup opens with 'Plus de détails' button
4. Click 'Plus de détails' button - detail slide-over panel opens from right (data-testid='map-detail-panel')
5. Panel shows: asset name (Imprimante), reference, status chips (Sortie, Return), mini map with coordinates (46.52035, 6.61439)
6. Panel shows info rows: Famille (Pt taille), Statut (Return), Batterie (*0%), Site (MEDINA), Tag (—), Dernière activité (N/A), Arrivée (N/A), Mouvement (Sortie zone), Modèle (Epson), VIN (WF 4745)
7. Close button (data-testid='map-detail-close') closes the panel successfully
critical_code_review_comments: PremiumMap.jsx: Detail panel implementation is complete with all required data-testid attributes
DetailRow component properly renders info rows with icons and values
formatTimeAgo helper function handles date formatting correctly
Mini map uses MapContainer from react-leaflet with proper coordinates
Panel animation (ltmapSlideIn) provides smooth slide-in effect from right
Backdrop click handler properly closes panel via onClick on overlay
seed_data_creation: None - using external API data via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: Map detail panel feature fully tested and working. To test: 1) Login with admin/user@1234, 2) Navigate to /tour/index, 3) Wait 15-18 seconds for external API data, 4) Click on cluster marker (blue circle with number) to expand, 5) Click on individual marker (colored pin), 6) Click 'Plus de détails' button in popup, 7) Verify panel content and close functionality. External API is slow - always use wait_for_timeout(15000-18000) after navigating to map.

map_detail_panel.trigger: Click 'Plus de détails' button in marker popup

panel_content.header: Asset photo, name, reference, close button
panel_content.mini_map: MapContainer with marker at asset coordinates
